title: Q&A Canceled - June 21st

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone!

I am sorry to let you know that today’s Q&A session is cancelled.

Zoom appears to be down and I can’t get into our account to get the email addresses of the people who signed up for it and let them know personally.

I am extremely sorry about the last minute announcement!

See you all next week!

Cheers,
Matias
